goal: Move all Python runtime files to .cnogo/scripts/ with working imports

tasks.name: Create _bootstrap.py and move workflow scripts
microSteps: git mv each of the 9 workflow .py files from scripts/ to .cnogo/scripts/
Add 'import _bootstrap  # noqa: F401' after 'from __future__ import annotations' in each moved script
Verify python3 .cnogo/scripts/workflow_memory.py --help runs without import errors

tdd.reason: File moves with bootstrap import — no new logic to test, verified by import check

tasks.action: Create .cnogo/scripts/_bootstrap.py with sys.path setup (adds .cnogo/ directory to sys.path so 'from scripts.memory import ...' resolves correctly). Then git mv the 9 workflow Python scripts from scripts/ to .cnogo/scripts/. Add 'import _bootstrap  # noqa: F401' as the first import after 'from __future__ import annotations' in each moved file. The _bootstrap.py content: import os, sys; _cnogo_dir = os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))); add _cnogo_dir to sys.path if not present.
verify: python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, '.cnogo'); import scripts.memory; print('memory import OK')"

tasks.name: Move memory and context packages
microSteps: Verify directory structure is intact (memory/ has 13 files, context/ has phases/ subdir)

tdd.reason: Directory moves — no code changes, verified by import checks

tasks.action: git mv the memory/ and context/ packages from scripts/ to .cnogo/scripts/. These are pure directory moves — no code changes needed inside the packages because _bootstrap.py ensures 'from scripts.memory import ...' and 'from scripts.context import ...' resolve to the new location.
verify: python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, '.cnogo'); from scripts.memory import is_initialized; print('memory OK')"
python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, '.cnogo'); from scripts.context.phases.structure import process_structure; print('context OK')"

tasks.name: Create tests/conftest.py and verify all tests pass
microSteps: Create tests/conftest.py that adds .cnogo/ to sys.path via conftest fixture
Run the full test suite to verify all 19 test files find their imports

tdd.reason: conftest.py is test infrastructure — verified by running the tests themselves

tasks.action: Create tests/conftest.py with sys.path setup: import sys, os; sys.path.insert(0, os.path.join(os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))), '.cnogo')). This makes all 19 test files that import from scripts.memory or scripts.context work without changes. Run pytest to verify.
